evidence: "I have enjoyed every season of Mozart in the Jungle Seasons. The music is wonderful and all the characters so enjoyable."
"Love this laid back series of a different time and a different way of life."
"I loved this charming story of a window beginning a different life."
"The story line here is of events leading up to the 1st World War."
"I fell in love with Mrs. Palfrey & wish that her story had lasted longer..."
"The acting is good and the characters interesting. The story line is both serious and entertaining..."
"The acting was brilliant and the story line thought provoking..."
"I have seen all three seasons and it is an excellent show for grown ups."
"I love the complete series collection and will treasure it."
"Five stars alone just for the music!. Very interesting story lines."
"Love this series. You could watch it several times and find something new."
"I wish that the current north and south could find more things to agree on."

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama and historical narratives, particularly those with rich character development and emotional depth. They appreciate high-quality production and storytelling that evokes strong feelings, often enjoying slower-paced, character-driven stories.
